text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
161 
MDCD_DSH_PD_AMT 
LABEL: 
Medicaid Amount Paid Disproportionate Share Hospital (DSH) 
DESCRIPTION: The amount included in the MDCD_PD_AMT that is attributable to a Disproportionate Share Hospital 
(DSH) payment, when the state makes DSH payments by claim. 
SHORT NAME: MDCD_DSH_PD_AMT 
LONG NAME: MDCD_DSH_PD_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims
